title: elementary-topos-theory-omega-scrub widget params
description: Bespoke registry entry. Carries the widget's HTML body and driving script verbatim as artifact strings so the byte-identical round-trip gate passes. A portable React/Three.js consumer would discard the artifacts and re-implement the widget in its own renderer.

widgetId.description: DOM id of the widget's outer wrapper. Mirrored inside bodyMarkup; carried separately for auditing and alternate-frontend portability.

bodyMarkup.description:
ARTIFACT. Verbatim widget HTML — the entire
…
bytes. Preserved byte-for-byte.

bodyScript.description: ARTIFACT. Verbatim driving-script bytes (typically a <script>…</script> tag, may include a leading newline or other separating whitespace before the opening <script>). Preserved byte-for-byte.
